title: RDH
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"c0914","text":"This algorithm implements Reversible Data Hiding (RDH) technique by rearranging the columns (or rows) of the image in a way that enhances the smooth regions of an image. Any difference based technique to embed data can then be used in the transformed image.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
